# Elys - Robots.txt
# https://elys.com.br/robots.txt

User-agent: Googlebot
Allow: /

User-agent: Bingbot
Allow: /

User-agent: Twitterbot
Allow: /

User-agent: facebookexternalhit
Allow: /

User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Disallow admin or private paths (if any in the future)
# Disallow: /admin/
# Disallow: /private/

# Sitemaps
Sitemap: https://elys.com.br/sitemap.xml

# Crawl-delay (optional, helps prevent overload)
Crawl-delay: 1

# Block or slow down aggressive crawlers
User-agent: AhrefsBot
Crawl-delay: 10

User-agent: SemrushBot
Crawl-delay: 10
